recommendations.title: Mainstream
recommendations.overview: A young woman thinks she’s found a path to internet stardom when she starts making YouTube videos with a charismatic stranger  – until the dark side of viral celebrity threatens to ruin them both.

recommendations.title: Shelter
recommendations.overview: Forced to give up his dreams of art school, Zach works dead-end jobs to support his sister and her son. Questioning his life, he paints, surfs and hangs out with his best friend, Gabe. When Gabe's older brother returns home for the summer, Zach sudde

recommendations.title: Goosebumps
recommendations.overview: After moving to a small town, Zach Cooper finds a silver lining when he meets next door neighbor Hannah, the daughter of bestselling Goosebumps series author R.L. Stine. When Zach unintentionally unleashes real monsters from their manuscripts and the

recommendations.title: Clouds
recommendations.overview: Young musician Zach Sobiech discovers his cancer has spread, leaving him just a few months to live. With limited time, he follows his dream and makes an album, unaware that it will soon be a viral music phenomenon.

recommendations.title: Veinteañera, divorciada y fantástica
recommendations.overview: Regina, our young protagonist, always dreamed of getting married. And she did it - but the dream lasted much less than she thought and now she has to face life in a very funny way as a divorcee.

recommendations.title: Dirty Deeds
recommendations.overview: According to a high school's lore, the "Dirty Deeds" are a daunting list of dares almost no student has ever completed. To win the student body's respect and get noticed by his crush, senior Zach is determined to finish the list in the allotted 24-ho

recommendations.title: Radiostars
recommendations.overview: Ben, who dreamed of himself as a comic in New York, is back in Paris, his professional and emotional life in complete disarray. He encounters Alex, the star host of the Breakfast Club, a popular morning radio show. With Cyril, a forty-something who'd

recommendations.title: She's All That
recommendations.overview: High school hotshot Zach Siler is the envy of his peers. But his popularity declines sharply when his cheerleader girlfriend, Taylor, leaves him for sleazy reality-television star Brock Hudson. Desperate to revive his fading reputation, Siler agrees

recommendations.title: Date with Love
recommendations.overview: When a boy’s video to a female star goes viral, it scores him a date with his celebrity crush to the prom. Complications arise when the famous starlet falls for the boy’s small-town teacher.

recommendations.title: And Now for Something Completely Different
recommendations.overview: A collection of Monty Python's Flying Circus skits from the first two seasons of their British TV series.
